kickoff_budget_note: Within the default AGENTS.md low-risk budget: 3 completed tasks, 3 reviewed files, no shared or integrator-locked edits, and all required local gates rerun on 2026-03-20 before handoff.
roadmap_items: Retrieval orchestration policy: centralize FTS-first strategy selection and fallback metadata.
Auditable FTS-first retrieval behavior: keep diagnostics, provenance, and audit output aligned with policy.
scope_goal: Centralize the FTS-first retrieval policy in engine/retrieval and propagate policy metadata through retrieval diagnostics, provenance, and audit records.
tasks_completed: Reconciled the packet with commit `d050e4016bb446424a031b3c0b9c21b26220c5a9`, confirming the reviewed diff only changes `src/qual/engine/retrieval/__init__.py`, `src/qual/engine/retrieval/policy.py`, and `src/qual/retrieval/service.py`.

Added an explicit `Scope completed` field and tightened the roadmap and vision mapping to FTS-first policy centralization plus auditable diagnostics, provenance, and audit output.
